decisions: React TypeScript Vite plus Rust in Tauri v2
lossless INI merge with diff and verified backups
integrated launcher and tray process supervisor
all Windows priority classes are user-selectable with High and Realtime warnings
Focus Mode is default-off, previewed, exclusion-driven, session-scoped, and exactly restored
Discord, active audio, communication, recording, streaming, foreground, and critical processes are protected by default
Focus Mode is contention-driven and per-core aware, uses soft background CPU Sets only on safe topologies, and never defaults WuWa to one or two cores
WuWa and NVIDIA shader caches are separate preview-first maintenance targets with exact allowlists and no forced process termination
original T monogram; no Kuro character derivative

codexThinkPreflight.fallbackReason: No codexthink_status, project_docs, route_doc, checkpoint, gate, or handoff tools were exposed after tool discovery. Local spec/checkpoint/evidence files are used as the fallback.

openMinors: Task 3: add a dedicated mixed LF/CRLF terminator preservation regression test
Task 5: reuse custom INI grammar before adding any catalog-managed text option
Task 6: harden superscript COM/LPT and CONIN$/CONOUT$ aliases
Task 6: execute registry, junction, and reparse discovery tests on Windows CI and a clean VM
Task 7: execute helper-process, WASAPI, PDH, CPU Set, QoS, and Focus restore tests on Windows CI and a clean VM
Task 8: execute the supervisor, single-instance, tray, updater-resume, and fail-closed process-observation paths on Windows CI and a clean VM
Task 9: recapture the final global-updater shell at the minimum Windows viewport during Windows desktop QA
Task 13: install, launch, upgrade, uninstall, and tamper-test the signed x64 NSIS beta on a clean Windows VM
next: Collect clean-Windows install, runtime, update, tamper, restore, and hardware-matrix evidence before promoting a build to stable 1.0.0
